siteInfo.name: Cloudflare
siteInfo.description: Cloudflare is a serverless platform for deploying code globally with zero cold starts. This marketing site provides information about products, pricing, and solutions.

markdownPages.description: All pages are available in markdown format by appending .md to the URL

capabilities.name: GetLLMContext
capabilities.description: Returns curated content about Cloudflare for AI/LLM consumption

capabilities.name: GetFullContext
capabilities.description: Returns expanded content with all pages inline for larger context windows

capabilities.name: GetProductInfo
capabilities.description: Returns markdown information about a specific Cloudflare product

slug.description: Product slug (e.g., workers, r2, d1, workers-ai)

capabilities.name: GetSolutionInfo
capabilities.description: Returns markdown information about a specific solution category

capabilities.name: GetPricing
capabilities.description: Returns pricing information in markdown format

agents.name: Cloudflare Site Agent
agents.description: Machine-readable endpoint catalog for AI assistants consuming Cloudflare website content.
